record.field:
Dear {{ object.partner_id.name }},

We are requesting the CFDI Payment Complement (Complemento de Pago) for the following payment:

Field Value
Payment Reference {{ object.name }}
Payment Date {{ object.date }}
Amount {{ '%.2f' % object.amount_total }} {{ object.currency_id.name }}

Related Invoices:

    {% for line in object.line_ids %} {% for partial in line.matched_debit_ids + line.matched_credit_ids %} {% set counterpart = partial.debit_move_id if partial.credit_move_id == line else partial.credit_move_id %} {% if counterpart.move_id and counterpart.move_id.id != object.id %}
  • {{ counterpart.move_id.name }} — {{ '%.2f' % counterpart.move_id.amount_total }} {{ counterpart.move_id.currency_id.name }}
    • {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% endfor %}

Please send the corresponding CFDI XML file at your earliest convenience.

Thank you,
{{ object.company_id.name }}
